title: Tome V Act 17: The Chart Shop Opens · Pleione's First Hold

story.text:
# 📖 Tome V Act 17: The Chart Shop Opens · Pleione's First Hold
**act** · mage · narrative

v1.6.0 · 2026-05-14. Pleione 🧭 (Greek Πληιόνη · the Sailing One · mother of the Pleiades) opens the Chart Shop at V44 in the Navigation District. The attentional register · fourth structural workshop class candidate · C63 ~50%. The trace V0 → V8 → V12 → V44 walks Memory → Connection → Protection (Hold → Compare → Map) as curriculum. The Astrolabe is the seventh tool-class artefact registered.
> *The star that is named by the sailor becomes the fixed point for the entire fleet.*

story.text: the full prose of this act, in the Tomes.

- *founds* → [[the Chart Shop]]
- *inhabits* → [[V44 — Chart Shop · Navigation District (Pleione)]]

- *references* → [[C54 · Phi-Adjacency]]

- [[Pleione 🧭]] *narrates* →
